positive: Minimalist abstract celestial landscape featuring stylized constellations forming geometric patterns. Deep midnight blue and cosmic violet palette with pops of neon turquoise and gold leaf accents. A crescent moon and stylized, ethereal nebulae should float above a simple horizon line composed of geometric, flowing brushstrokes. Style should be clean vector art mixed with elegant ink wash watercolor textures. High contrast, perfect symmetry, central composition, suitable for T-shirt printing, flat lay presentation, vibrant colors, 4K.
